name: Jacket
description:
Monogram Padded Windbreaker

This hooded windbreaker from the Spring-Summer 2025 show elevates a classic piece of outerwear with a tone-on-tone embossed allover Monogram motif in an elegant sandy color. It is lightly padded for comfort while the lining adds a silky accent. This versatile piece brings a chic signature look to everyday ensembles.

metadata.title: Jacket Louis Vuitton Camel size M International in Polyester - 66935196
